name: skidl-lsp
description: SKiDL Language Server: real-time KiCad symbol, footprint, and pin validation for SKiDL Python files

skidl.kicadSymbolDir.description: Override auto-detected KiCad symbol library directory

skidl.kicadFootprintDir.description: Override auto-detected KiCad footprint library directory

skidl.enableDiagnostics.description: Enable real-time diagnostics for Part(), footprint, and pin validation

skidl.enableAutocomplete.description: Enable autocomplete for library names, symbols, footprints, and pins

skidl.enableHover.description: Enable hover documentation for parts, pins, and footprints

skidl.pythonPath.description: Path to Python interpreter with pygls installed (for the language server)

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run package
scripts.release:patch: node scripts/bump-version.js patch && npm run build && node scripts/bump-version.js --tag
scripts.release:minor: node scripts/bump-version.js minor && npm run build && node scripts/bump-version.js --tag
scripts.release:major: node scripts/bump-version.js major && npm run build && node scripts/bump-version.js --tag
